working_on: Capture Önduygu philo-browser assessment + five usability axes as MemPalace exploration drawers; slot Phase 4.5 (Input Dataset Survey for Phase 5 Seed Authoring) into ROADMAP between Phase 4 and Phase 5; extend docs/content-strategy.md with Cross-Domain Reference Inventories scaffolding; cross-link Multi-Domain Expansion tension. Phase 1.3 confidence_level work moves to S-0010.
outcome_summary: Out-of-phase scope expansion absorbed from exploration per the no-silent-drops rule. Two MemPalace exploration drawers filed (Önduygu philo-browser assessment with verdict + ranked usable layers + pushback; five usability axes for input-dataset survey with tiered scope discipline + compatibility check against Generative Graph Independence). ROADMAP.md gains new Phase 4.5 (Input Dataset Survey) between Phase 4 and Phase 5: five axes, four tiers, Önduygu worked example, success criteria, scope discipline (research-and-recording, not commitment). Phase 5.2 cross-links to Phase 4.5 output. docs/content-strategy.md gains Cross-Domain Reference Inventories — Survey section operationalizing Phase 4.5 with three-bucket license distinction, per-candidate assessment template. docs/tensions.md Multi-Domain Expansion tension partially addressed (Tier 2 forcing-functions per-domain inventory identification). STATE.md and CHANGELOG.md updated; next-session pointer flips to S-0010 (Phase 1.3 confidence_level). The new phase explicitly preserves Generative Graph Independence and SEP-as-structural-reference postures — survey targets cross-reference inventories and prerequisite-shape priors, not corpus dependencies. tools/validate.py: 0 hard-fails, 0 soft-warns.
